name: twisting blue hallway
description: I'm in a twisting blue hallway
hints: A blue hallway. The blue security door is to the north.
NORTH leads to the blue room with a security door (highest clearance). SOUTH returns to the main corridor.
Go NORTH to the blue door (needs security-level ID). SOUTH to main corridor, WEST to white hallway.
notes: Blue hallway connecting the main corridor (S/room 3), blue security door (N/room 11), and white hallway (W/room 6).
